title: Better Template Crafting
description: Save up on materials with an extended process of duplicating Smithing Templates
body:
## Ever been annoyed of spending so many diamonds?
### Template Samples
Use **Template Samples** to make Smithing Templates, and spend less expensive materials. The duplication recipes are made **cheaper to craft**, as only **4 instead of 7 diamonds** are being required.
<details>
<summary>Recipes of Template Samples</summary>

</details>
